metadata.title: My Forbidden Lover
metadata.album: Good Times: The Very Best Of Chic & Sister Sledge
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.36] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[00:27.35] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[00:37.89] I fell in love and I didn't want to do it 'cause I knew
[00:43.92] That your love wasn't true
[00:46.86] You try to hide that sinister appearance and the lies
[00:52.67] Whew, those alibis
[00:55.75] You give your love to anyone who asks, yes you do
[01:01.86] And I know that it's true
[01:04.71] But still I care, and I want to see you there
[01:08.57] When I need, yes indeed, you are
[01:12.33] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[01:21.30] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[01:30.37] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[01:39.35] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[01:49.82] I can't resist that very strong urge to have you, dear
[01:55.90] Oh, please come here
[01:58.75] Just let me love you, anytime and any place we dare
[02:04.91] We'll just let them stare
[02:07.87] You want to love everybody and everything you can
[02:13.92] You're the typical man
[02:16.86] Yet still and all, I'm at your beck and call
[02:20.69] When you need, yes indeed, you are
[02:24.40] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[02:33.48] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[02:42.41] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[02:51.43] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[03:00.51] My love is forbidden, we keep our love hidden
[03:04.21] 
[03:06.36] 
[03:09.41] My love is forbidden, we keep our love hidden
[03:15.56] 
[03:18.48] My love is forbidden, we keep our love hidden
[03:24.62] 
[03:27.40] My love is forbidden, we keep our love hidden
[03:33.57] 
[03:36.45] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[03:45.45] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
[03:54.45] My forbidden lover, I don't want, no other
